meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving provides an efficient and competitively priced removals and storage service to clients across Newhaven and Sussex. Local moves in East Sussex for homes and businesses.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals Newhaven and Sussex

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage we offer a complete moving and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Moving Home? We can make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage

Choosing the right removals firm to move your possessions is very important. You need to know you have secured good value, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning will understand your requirements properly and have both the training and necessary equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

Mark Ratcliffe has been working in the UK domestic removals and storage market, working with customers throughout Newhaven, the South East and nationally, for more than 30 years. Quality is at the core of everything we do, it is what we have built our enviable reputation within the industry upon. Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre and all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, moving and wrapping household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as vehicle loading and customer services. You can expect the highest standards, competitive prices and a real commitment from everyone involved in your move when choosing Mark Ratcliffe moving.

Moving home in Newhaven? Choose a company you can trust 

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving service for removals in Newhaven and the surrounding Sussex area. Whether you have a 3 piece suite to move across the town, or a 4 bed house to move up to Scotland, we are equipped with the necessary equipment, staff and skill to move you with ease. We are also well placed to help and advise you on all of your moving needs.

Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home at a convenient time to carry out an onsite survey and discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move with you. Packing requirements and insurance cover for your valuable possessions can also be discussed. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, packing and storage if required. We also offer a house clearance service and can discuss this in more detail with you. On your move day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect carpets, cover exposed banisters and doors etc. If required, they will pack and move your belongings with care and transport them safely to your new home in Newhaven or further afield.

Professional Packing Service 

Mark Ratcliffe Moving can provide a full packing service or packing of fragile items only. Should you decide to carry out your own packing prior to move day, we provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc...all at a minimal cost and can be collected from our shop located in Eastbourne, 7 days a week. 

Safe and Secure Storage in Newhaven  

Mark Ratcliffe Moving also offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. Various size rooms are available with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. We rent this size room at £30 plus vat per week. Our storage rooms are much higher than our local competitors and our charges are over 50% less than the rest. Please call in anytime to view our rooms and satisfy yourself that your valuable possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free clean environment and you being the only key holder with great access for loading / unloading.

Whether you are moving within Newhaven or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can meet all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. We would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please call Sharon Harris at our Eastbourne branch on 01323 848 008 to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers.
